prompt_text: Metabase vs Looker pricing and features
response:
# Metabase vs Looker: Pricing & Features

## **Pricing**

| Aspect | Metabase | Looker |
|--------|----------|--------|
| **Pricing Model** | Open-source (free) + Cloud subscription | Enterprise-only (no free tier) |
| **Cloud Cost** | $29-820/month (scale-based) | Custom quotes; typically $5K-100K+/year |
| **Self-Hosted** | Free or $12K/year (Pro) | $70K+/year (requires license) |
| **Entry Level** | Best for budget-conscious teams | Premium pricing from start |

---

## **Key Features Comparison**

### **Metabase**
✅ **Strengths:**
- Intuitive query builder (SQL & visual)
- Quick setup (10 minutes)
- Mobile-friendly dashboards
- Embedded analytics support
- Good for small-to-mid teams

❌ **Limitations:**
- Less advanced visualization options
- Limited collaboration features
- Weaker data governance
- Slower performance at scale

### **Looker**
✅ **Strengths:**
- Powerful LookML language for complex logic
- Enterprise-grade governance & security
- Advanced AI/ML capabilities (Looker Studio, Cortex)
- Superior performance at scale
- Strong embedded analytics

❌ **Limitations:**
- Steep learning curve
- High cost of entry
- Requires technical expertise
- Longer implementation time

---

## **Best For**

| Choose **Metabase** if you need: | Choose **Looker** if you need: |
|----------------------------------|-------------------------------|
| Budget-friendly solution | Enterprise-grade analytics |
| Fast deployment | Complex data modeling |
| Self-service analytics | Governance & compliance |
| Small-to-medium teams | Large-scale deployments |
| Simple dashboards | AI-powered insights |

---

## **Quick Decision Matrix**

**Use Metabase:** Startups, SMBs, internal analytics, quick insights
**Use Looker:** Enterprise, regulated industries, complex pipelines, white-label solutions

**Need more details on specific features or use cases?**
